flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Central Lakes College-Brainerd are 8% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($42.2k vs $45.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Central Lakes College-Brainerd fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Central Lakes College-Brainerd rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (58.5% → 68.6%).
